control_awareness: Splitting purchase requests to bypass amount-based approval thresholds weakens the Amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001), potentially leading to insufficient review and increased risk of inappropriate spending.
expected_control_effect: The total purchase is approved faster but circumventing the intended control that higher-value purchases require higher-level approvals; this could lead to inadequate oversight of large expenditures.
overall_reason: Under tight customer delivery deadlines, splitting the total purchase amount into smaller chunks can speed up the approval process by requiring only manager-level approvals, which have shorter lead times than department_head approvals.
reason: Under tight customer delivery deadlines, splitting the total purchase amount into smaller chunks can speed up the approval process by requiring only manager-level approvals, which have shorter lead times than department_head approvals.
